name: Vicious Jibe
flavor: You find the one thing they hate about themselves and say it louder than they can think.
description: You unleash a string of insults laced with subtle magic at a creature you can see within range that can hear you (the trick has no effect on a target that is deaf). The target must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw against your {{trick save DC|8 + proficiency bonus + your trick ability modifier}} or take [[1d4]] psychic damage and have disadvantage on the next attack roll it makes before the end of its next turn, too busy stewing over what you said to focus.
sheetSummary: Action, 60 ft. Wis save vs trick save DC. Fail: [[1d4]] psychic damage, disadvantage on target's next attack roll before end of its next turn. No effect on a deaf target.
